Itemized  ·  Procedures  ·  Brain MRI without contrast  ·  California

Brain MRI without contrast cost in California.

Cash-pay range for brain mri without contrast across 50 hospitals in California: $46 to $7,599. CPT code 70551. Pulled from each hospital's federally-mandated price transparency file.

Cheapest in California
$46
Adventist Health Glendale
Glendale, CA
vs.
Most expensive in California
$7,599
Garfield Medical Center
Monterey Park, CA

A consumer reading of CMS-mandated MRF data. Not medical or financial advice. Itemized · itemized.health
